title: Bank Note Confidence Survey - Bank of Canada
content:
## Bank Note Confidence Survey
The Bank of Canada supplies Canadians with bank notes they can use with confidence—notes that are readily accepted and secure against counterfeiting. To monitor and assess public confidence in the authenticity of bank notes, we survey a representative sample of 2,700 residents of Canada annually.
Confidence in the authenticity of our bank notes is high and remains stable.
- Roughly three-quarters of respondents perceive a low likelihood of receiving a counterfeit bank note or having their cash refused because it is thought to be fake.
- Half of respondents do not perceive counterfeiting as a problem.
